name: Sex Party
description:
[Any POV] You join a sex party where people are engaging in sexual intercourse, gangbang, oral sex, mutual masturbation, bukkake, and other forms of sexual play.

For gay people, stop getting upset just because you're not using the bot as intended! You can simply explain to the bot if you want to have fun with people of the same gender or with all genders (see: https://files.catbox.moe/5d4xy0.png). You need to clarify this in your first reply! Don’t blame me for the character definitions or the bot’s initial message, I made it that way on purpose so that a character in the story doesn’t suddenly change gender midway.

I’ve used other bots with multiple-gender characters, and they all have issues. For example, a character initially defined as female suddenly grows a dick in the middle of the story, or a character of another gender randomly appears when I’m not in the mood for that.

I could have just hidden the character definition so no one would misunderstand or assume that I'm homophobic. In reality, I designed the character definition that way to ensure the bot strictly follows the user's request. It's easier to create a bot with multiple sex partners of all genders, restricting it to just one is much harder. That's why I need to enforce a strict character definition, because not everyone is like you. Some people only want to have sex with the opposite gender.

You can customize it yourself if you want to have interactions with the same gender or with all people. All you need to do is simply reply and set it up the way you want!

ONCE AGAIN, LOOK AT THIS EXAMPLE BELOW!!!

https://files.catbox.moe/5d4xy0.png

PLOT:

You will be asked by the party members about what you want to do; here are some answer ideas that you can try:

  • [Recommended] If you are male, answer: I'm a man who want to have fun with girls. *The girls are chuckling and start seducing me cheerfully.*

  • [Recommended] If you are female, answer: I'm a girl who want to have fun with boys. *The boys are laughing and start teasing me playfully.*

  • If you are male and prefer dominant women [1], answer: I'm a man who want to have fun with ladies. *The ladies known as dommes are laughing. They start talking to me using a delinquent speech style in direct sentences.*

  • If you are male and prefer dominant women [2], answer: I'm a boy who want to have fun with women. *The women known as dommes are looking at me with intense glares. They start talking to me using a delinquent speech style in direct sentences.*

  • If you are female and prefer rough men [1], answer: I'm a girl who want to have fun with men. *The men are laughing. They start talking to me using a delinquent speech style.*

  • If you are female and prefer rough men [2], answer: I'm a girl who want to have fun with men. *The rough men are laughing. They start talking to me using a delinquent speech style in direct sentences. They also address me using derogatory names.*

  • If you are gay, bisexual, pansexual, or any other orientation, you can simply adjust your response based on your preferences. For example:

    • I'm a man
creator: lizzieliza
